response.summary: Strategic Principal Product Manager with over five years of experience leading end-to-end technology products and zero-to-one launches. Expert in driving product vision and roadmaps with an AI-first mindset, leveraging GenAI and predictive analytics to optimize customer experiences. A data-driven leader skilled at stakeholder alignment and rapid experimentation to accelerate validation cycles in complex ecosystems.
